response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and a broad range of experience across multiple languages and domains, including Java and JVM-adjacent languages like C/C++ at National Instruments. However, her direct experience with Java/Kotlin ecosystems, Spring, and IDE tooling is limited or not prominently featured in her resume. Her roles have primarily focused on web, mobile, and embedded systems, with only tangential mentions of Java/Dlang and no clear evidence of deep JVM tooling or IDE development experience.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with full-stack and system-level experience
Proven track record in collaboration, mentorship, and open-source contributions
Experience with diverse tech stacks and problem-solving in complex domains
concerns: Limited or no direct experience with Java/Kotlin, Spring, or enterprise JVM tooling
No explicit mention of IDE internals, language tooling, or developer-experience optimization
Resume does not highlight ownership of end-to-end IDE features or subsystems
